subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The letter which through His Honour Haydar-'Alí, upon him be the glory of Bahá'u'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی عبدالبهاء نامه ای که بواسطه حضرت حیدر قبل علی علیه بهاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
